title: Vendor in containers/image v5.13.1
body:
Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

<!--
Thanks for sending a pull request!

Please make sure you've read our contributing guidelines and how to submit a pull request (https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md#submitting-pull-requests).

In case you're only changing docs, make sure to prefix the pull-request title with "[CI:DOCS]".  That will prevent functional tests from running and save time and energy.
-->

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
@vrothberg @mtrmac Something is very wrong with containers/image as far as Podman is concerned?

[+0174s] Running: /var/tmp/go/src/github.com/containers/podman/bin/podman --root /tmp/crio --runroot /tmp/crio-run --runtime crun --conmon /usr/bin/conmon --cni-config-dir /etc/cni/net.d --cgroup-manager cgroupfs --tmpdir /tmp --events-backend file --storage-driver vfs save -o /tmp/volume-plugin-test-img-latest.tar quay.io/libpod/volume-plugin-test-img:latest
[+0174s] Getting image source signatures
[+0174s] Error: error creating LayerInfosForCopy of image "829026c38bd5a9a33d401c278247c86d5a03e7e6e8e7e172abb884886dcf4c48": used only 2 out of 5 physical layers
[+0174s]
Sigh. Maybe the early-commit + empty-layer thing again, @mtrmac?
I may not find time today to look into this. I need to create slides (and a recording) for a presentation on Monday.

> I may not find time today to look into this. I need to create slides (and a recording) for a presentation on Monday.

Looking into it now.

Before:
```
image (main) $ podman image tree quay.io/libpod/volume-plugin-test-img                         
Image ID: 829026c38bd5                                                                         
Tags:     [quay.io/libpod/volume-plugin-test-img:latest]                                       
Size:     15.54MB                                                                              
Image Layers                                                                                   
├── ID: 50644c29ef5a Size: 5.845MB                                                             
└── ID: c286ec61ea46 Size: 9.689MB Top Layer of: [quay.io/libpod/volume-plugin-test-img:latest]
```

After:
```
image (main) $ ~/containers/podman/bin/podman image tree quay.io/libpod/volume-plugin-test-img  
Image ID: 829026c38bd5                                                                          
Tags:     [quay.io/libpod/volume-plugin-test-img:latest]                                        
Size:     15.54MB                                                                               
Image Layers                                                                                    
├── ID: 50644c29ef5a Size: 5.845MB                                                              
├── ID: 0b33c3bcf13d Size: 1.024kB                                                              
├── ID: 8ed04084efa0 Size: 9.689MB                                                              
├── ID: f488dbff7b86 Size: 1.024kB                                                              
└── ID: 8a2d4c593daa Size: 1.024kB Top Layer of: [quay.io/libpod/volume-plugin-test-img:latest] 
```

Looks like https://github.com/containers/image/commit/db5fb6ee19daca1e6cb349882cd3a3cacb8da066 was not enough.
I see the bug now. Ouch, I'll open a PR in c/image in a jiffy.
